chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P.No.D-467 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.10.2025 Mr. Zulfiquar Ali Laghari, advocate along with petitioners No.1 and 5. Mr. Santosh Kumar, advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G along with Maaz Saleem Executive Engineer and Sadam Hussain Assistant Executive Engineer Kot Ghulam Muhmmad. = Learned counsel for petitioner files objections / rejoinder against the comments of respondents No.4 and 12, taken on record. Mr. Maaz Saleem Executive Engineer present submits that the petitioners are getting due adequate share from water course. As far complaint with regard to leveling of the water course is concerned, per him entire process was initiated after completion of technical formalities hence, there is no issue as alleged however, as far their due share is concerned, he submits that since they have been getting due share of water. He further contends to provide as per their due share as well the permissible water share list. In our view, the purpose of petition in view of above has been achieved hence, it is hereby disposed of accordingly. However, the officials present shall ensure compliance of directions as well provisions of the adequate cum due share of water to the lands of petitioners without any negligence or causing any hurdle. Petition stands disposed of accordingly JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
